problem id: ffce9e31
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(6)

examples:
  11100001 -> 11000111
  11001001 -> 01100111
  01001001 -> 01100101
  01101110 -> 10111001
  00011101 -> 01110100
  01111111 -> 11111101
  11101010 -> 10101011
  01000111 -> 11011101

query: 10011001
predicted answer: 01100110
